summary: Backend regression after new features (admin auth, messaging, referrals, photos, college auto-verify). 31/31 pytest tests PASSED against public URL. Admin JWT auth works, admin endpoints enforce auth (401 without token), stats/users/grant-premium/delete-user/delete-confession all verified with DB persistence checks. Messaging gating (403 unless matched) works; conversations/last_message/unread_count returned correctly; messages marked read on GET. Referral stats endpoint returns code/count/days_remaining; 7-day premium reward logic verified. Photo upload/delete persist correctly. College email auto-verify could NOT be live-tested because POST /api/auth/google-session calls Emergent OAuth (requires real session_id); the code branch (server.py:316-336) and seeded domains (iitd.ac.in, ipu.ac.in, lsr.edu.in, etc.) were verified. Backend health, colleges list, discovery/confession/rating endpoints regression-passing.

minor.issue: Pass action is not persisted; passed user can reappear in discovery results.
Cannot be live-tested without real Emergent OAuth session_id. Verified via code review only. Main agent should manually verify with both a college email (iitd.ac.in) and gmail.com.
These admin endpoints still use get_current_user (regular session), not verify_admin (JWT). Inconsistent with new admin auth pattern - any logged-in user could call them (server.py:891-967).

react_native_issues.issue: Metro bundling FAILED with SyntaxError: Missing semicolon at line 468 - `PhotoText: { color: '#FF3366', ...}` appears placed outside any object literal (likely missing closing `}` on previous block or stray top-level identifier). This prevents the entire web bundle from building. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx:468

action_items: HIGH: Fix syntax error in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx:468 - frontend currently cannot bundle.
MEDIUM: Migrate /api/admin/verification-requests, /api/admin/verification/{id}/approve and /reject to use verify_admin (JWT) instead of get_current_user, for consistency with the new admin auth.
LOW: Persist /api/discovery/pass actions so passed users don't reappear (currently a no-op).
LOW: Split server.py (1389 lines) into modules (auth, admin, messaging, referrals, discovery, confessions).
INFO: Manually verify google-session auto-verify branch with a real college email (e.g., iitd.ac.in) and a personal Gmail to confirm verification_status assignment.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1389 lines - violates >700 LOC guideline; should be modularized.

ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH is generated at import-time with a fresh salt (line 32). This works but means every backend restart invalidates any stored hash and would not work with hashes-from-env; acceptable for current design but worth noting.
JWT_SECRET has a default 'change-me' fallback in code; .env sets a real secret, but the fallback could cause silent insecure deployments if env var is missing.
Admin verification endpoints (lines 891-967) predate the new admin auth and still use get_current_user. Any authenticated user can approve/reject verifications - SECURITY ISSUE.
/api/discovery/pass is a no-op - architectural bug; either remove or store passes.
seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions inserted into MongoDB via pymongo fixtures (user_a, user_b) with TEST_ email prefix; cleaned up after session. Temporary confession + user created and deleted within admin tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers all new admin/messaging/referral/photo endpoints + regression. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (no EXPO_BACKEND_URL key exists). Direct mongo session insertion is used because google-session endpoint requires real Emergent OAuth session_id which is not available in test env. If main agent fixes the admin verification-requests auth or the discovery/pass behavior, re-run pytest. Frontend has a CRITICAL bundling syntax error in profile.tsx:468 that must be fixed before any frontend testing.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all 31 backend tests passed. Frontend bundling failure RCA: in app/(tabs)/profile.tsx line 467 StyleSheet.create({...}) is closed with `});`, then line 468 `PhotoText: { ... }` appears as a stray object property at the top level of the file, outside any object/StyleSheet - likely a misplaced photo-button-text style that should be inside the StyleSheet.create() block.
